_publications._publicationTitle: Development of 3D culture models of plexiform neurofibroma and initial application for phenotypic characterization and drug screening

_contextSnippet: Individual cells spherical and typically formed hollow cup-shaped aggregates...grew as layered sheets...individual cells highly elongated, having two or more tendril-like outgrowths
details: Distinct morphologies distinguish NF1 PN from wild-type cells in 3D: wild-type Schwann cells form hollow cup-shaped aggregates of spherical cells; NF1 PN cells grow as layered sheets with elongated cells having two or more tendril-like outgrowths; NF1 PN doubling time in 3D is ~1 week vs 10–48 h in 2D monolayer
